ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
cdt_name:
- conda
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9

about.description: OpenSearch is a community-driven, open source fork of Elasticsearch and Kibana following the license change in early 2021. We're looking to sustain (and evolve!) a search and analytics suite for the multitude of businesses who are dependent on the rights granted by the original, Apache v2.0 License.
about.summary: OpenSearch is a the highly scalable and extensible open-source software suite for search, analytics, observability, and other data-intensive applications.

about.description: OpenSearch is a community-driven, open source fork of Elasticsearch and Kibana following the license change in early 2021. We're looking to sustain (and evolve!) a search and analytics suite for the multitude of businesses who are dependent on the rights granted by the original, Apache v2.0 License.
about.summary: OpenSearch is a the highly scalable and extensible open-source software suite for search, analytics, observability, and other data-intensive applications.

name: opensearch
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "opensearch" %}
{% set version = "3.5.0" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/opensearch-project/OpenSearch/archive/refs/tags/{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: b57b3bf4945d6759f31fbc76042c8ffdb5159bd12caf7738865f1b08d93f55c6

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic

requirements:
  build:
    - sed
    - openjdk =21
  run:
    - openjdk >=21

test:
  commands:
    - opensearch-keystore --help
    - opensearch-node --help
    - opensearch-plugin --help
    - opensearch-shard --help
    - opensearch-fips-demo-installer --help
    - opensearch --help

about:
  home: https://opensearch.org/
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE.txt
  summary: 'OpenSearch is a the highly scalable and extensible open-source software suite for search, analytics, observability, and other data-intensive applications.'
  description: >
    OpenSearch is a community-driven, open source fork of Elasticsearch and Kibana following the license change in early 2021. We're looking to sustain (and evolve!) a search and analytics suite for the multitude of businesses who are dependent on the rights granted by the original, Apache v2.0 License.
  doc_url: https://opensearch.org/docs/
  dev_url: https://github.com/opensearch-project/OpenSearch

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - tropicrainforest
